system.powerDescription:
You apply impossible mass to an object within sight. The combined size of this object and magnitude of the weight must equal to CAT+2 or less. When you activate this power, select one of the following ways to apply the mass: 

• BURDEN: The object itself grows heavier, acting as if its mass had increased. 

• PULVERIZE: The weight is applied as if it was on top of the object, potentially crushing or cracking it. 

Roll PSYCHE for this power’s effects, including any harm inflicted. Gain or grant +1D next time you or an ally take advantage of this power. This power may easily modify the parameters of a roll whilst active.
